name: ask-another
description: Query other AI models — including image and research models — through a unified MCP interface.

provider_openai.title: OpenAI API Key (optional)
provider_openai.description: Your OpenAI API key (starts with 'sk-'). Leave blank to skip OpenAI.

provider_gemini.title: Gemini API Key (optional)
provider_gemini.description: Your Google AI Studio API key. Leave blank to skip Gemini.

provider_openrouter.title: OpenRouter API Key (optional)
provider_openrouter.description: Your OpenRouter API key (starts with 'sk-or-'). Leave blank to skip OpenRouter.

zero_data_retention.title: Zero Data Retention (OpenRouter)
zero_data_retention.description: Filter OpenRouter results to ZDR-compatible models only.

open_generated_images.title: Open generated images in your image viewer
open_generated_images.description: Auto-open generated images in your system's default viewer (Preview on macOS).
